channel.title: ISA/IEC 62443 on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in ISA/IEC 62443 on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Risk Management
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Risk Management" , "ISA/IEC 62443" , "NERC CIP" , "Risk Assessment" , "Governance" , "Supply Chain Risk" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT risk management for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn risk fundamentals, frameworks like ISA/IEC 62443 and NERC CIP, qualitative and quantitative assessments, risk treatments, governance artifacts, third-party risk, and change management.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the SOT-001 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "SOT-001 Certification" , "OT Security" , "Operational Technology" , "Industrial Control Systems" , "SCADA Security" , "ICS Security" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Critical Infrastructure" , "OT Cybersecurity"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001) study course covering OT systems and safety foundations, OT risk management, OT threat intelligence, OT cybersecurity architecture, OT security operations, and OT incident management for control engineers and OT cybersecurity professionals.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001) Practice Test - SimeonOnSecurity
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+" , "SOT-001" , "practice test" , "OT security" , "ICS security" , "industrial control systems"
item.description: Prepare for the CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001) exam with our comprehensive practice test. Test your knowledge of OT systems and safety foundations, OT risk management, OT threat intelligence, OT cybersecurity architecture, OT security operations, and OT incident management.
